title: Flashcards — Basics of English
subtitle: 500 Hindi-English flashcards for Day 1 vocabulary and grammar
description: Ye 500 flashcards aapki Day 1 vocabulary aur grammar solid banane mein madad karengi. Roz 50 cards practice karo — 10 din mein sab yaad ho jaenge!

flashcards.exampleHindi: मैं अपनी notebook में लिखता हूँ।
मैं IT में काम करता हूँ।
हम एक-दूसरे की मदद करते हैं।
वह अपने परिवार से प्यार करता है।
हम एक घर में रहते हैं।
मैं एक office में काम करता हूँ।
हम अपने परिवार से प्यार करते हैं।
मैं अपना काम पूरा करता हूँ।

flashcards.front: Rule: He/She/It ke saath kya lagaate hain?
flashcards.back: He/She/It ke saath verb mein +s ya +es lagaate hain. He eats. She works. It runs.

flashcards.front: Rule: Negative sentence ka formula kya hai?
flashcards.back: I/You/We/They + don't + V1 | He/She/It + doesn't + V1. (doesn't ke baad 's' nahi!)

flashcards.front: Rule: Yes/No question ka formula kya hai?
flashcards.back: Do + I/You/We/They + V1? | Does + He/She/It + V1?
A = consonant sound se shuru hone wale singular nouns ke pehle. a book, a car, a university (yu=consonant)
An = vowel sound (a,e,i,o,u) se shuru hone wale singular nouns ke pehle. an apple, an hour (h silent), an engineer
The = specific cheez ke liye jab dono ko pata ho hum kis cheez ki baat kar rahe hain. The sun, the book on the table.
I HAVE. (have for I/You/We/They, has for He/She/It)
She HAS. (has is special for He/She/It)

flashcards.front: Frequency adverbs ki position kahan hoti hai?
flashcards.back: Main verb se PEHLE: I always eat breakfast. | is/am/are ke BAAD: She is always happy.

flashcards.front: Stative verbs kya hote hain? Example do.
flashcards.back: Jo verbs continuous (-ing) form mein use nahi hote: know, love, like, want, need, have(possession), understand. I know him. ✅ | I am knowing him. ❌
His = He ka (male ke liye): His book. | Her = She ka (female ke liye): Her dress.
Me, You, Him, Her, It, Us, Them — verb ke BAAD aate hain. She calls ME. I know HIM.

flashcards.front: WH question ka word order kya hai?
flashcards.back: WH word + do/does + Subject + base verb? | What do you eat? | Where does she live?
Does — He/She/It ke liye ALWAYS 'Does'. Does he work here?

flashcards.front: Sports ke pehle article lagata hai?
flashcards.back: NAHI! Sports ke pehle article nahi lagata. He plays cricket. ✅ | He plays the cricket. ❌

flashcards.front: मैं रोज़ सुबह exercise करता हूँ।
वह Bank में काम करती है।

flashcards.back: The sun rises in the east.
She wants to become a doctor.

flashcards.front: हम Monday को office नहीं जाते।
flashcards.back: We don't go to office on Monday.

flashcards.front: उसके पिता bank में काम करते हैं।
flashcards.back: His father works in a bank.
